command:
mkdir -p reports/runops/task_a_l1_canonical_readiness_refresh_20260704 && python - <<'PY' 2>&1 | tee reports/runops/task_a_l1_canonical_readiness_refresh_20260704/command_transcript_a_l1_canonical_readiness_refresh_20260704.txt
from qta.data.local_market_db.policy import load_a_share_local_db_policy
from qta.data.local_market_db.canonicalize import canonicalize_snapshot
from qta.data.local_market_db.coverage_report import generate_coverage_report
from qta.data.local_market_db.readiness import generate_readiness_decision
from qta.data.local_market_db.manifest import generate_snapshot_manifest
from qta.utils.io import write_json
snapshot_id='a_expand_20260704_l1_local1000_0317'
output_root='reports/runops/task_a_l1_canonical_readiness_refresh_20260704'
policy=load_a_share_local_db_policy()
canonical=canonicalize_snapshot(policy=policy, snapshot_id=snapshot_id)
coverage=generate_coverage_report(policy=policy, snapshot_id=snapshot_id, output_root=output_root)
readiness=generate_readiness_decision(policy=policy, snapshot_id=snapshot_id, output_root=output_root)
manifest=generate_snapshot_manifest(policy=policy, snapshot_id=snapshot_id, output_root=output_root)
result={'task':'a_share_l1_canonical_readiness_refresh','snapshot_id':snapshot_id,'canonicalize':canonical,'coverage':coverage,'readiness':readiness,'manifest':{'status':manifest.get('status'),'json_path':manifest.get('json_path'),'md_path':manifest.get('md_path'),'json_sha256':manifest.get('json_sha256')},'network_call_made':False,'registry_changed':False,'ticket_emitted':False,'recommendation_emitted':False,'broker_api_allowed':False,'order_routing_allowed':False,'paper_trading_allowed':False,'live_trading_allowed':False}
write_json(f'{output_root}/task_a_l1_canonical_readiness_refresh_result.json', result)
print(result)
PY
